sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, test_string VARCHAR);
SELECT id, test_string FROM test_strings WHERE regexp_full_match(test_string, '^(an)') = true;
UPDATE test_strings SET test_string = 'ananabobana' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regexp_full_match(test_string, '^(banana|an)$') AS matches FROM test_strings;
